description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house situated on a sloped plot with a combination of flat and angular surfaces. The exterior features a mix of dark wood paneling, white and gray concrete or stucco, and large glass windows, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The house includes a rooftop terrace, a cylindrical rooftop structure (possibly a skylight or water tank), and a spacious driveway with parking for multiple vehicles. The property is enclosed by a metal fence and has a landscaped lawn area surrounding the building. The main entrance is set back under a covered porch, and the house is designed with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor spaces and geometric forms.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, wood and concrete finishes, large windows, and a rooftop terrace, set on a sloped, fenced property with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the driveway with parked cars, main entrance, and the mix of wood and white exterior panels.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rooftop terrace, cylindrical rooftop feature, and the elongated shape of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back wall with minimal windows and the slope of the property.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the driveway, entryway, and the side lawn area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry under a covered porch, accessed from the driveway, with minimalistic design and no visible decorative elements.
